recommended.song_name: I Still Havent Found What Im Looking For

content:
Artist: Paula Abdul
Song: Opposites Attract
Album: Forever Your Girl
website: http://www.paulajabdul.com/
Tabbed By: Don Tago
Email: recebedou@yahoo.com

Standard Tuning (Capo III)

[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           
Baby seems we never ever agree You like the movies [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]         
And I like T.V. I take things serious And you take 'em light[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch] 
I go to bed early And you party all night [/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Our friends are sayin' We ain't gonna last [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Cuz I move slowly And baby you’re fast I like it quiet [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
And I love to shout But when we get together It just all works out [/tab]

[Chorus:] 
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
I take--2 steps forward I take--2 steps back [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
We come together Cuz opposites attract [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
And you know--it ain't fiction Just a natural fact [/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
We come together Cuz opposites attract [/tab]

.....ETC

and it continutes with the same chords thruout
